brand.tagline: Independent real estate agent — Valbonne & French Riviera

home.heroTitle: Luxury real estate advisory on the French Riviera
home.heroLead: A refined, discreet and international approach based in Valbonne, designed for clients who expect clarity, quality and a premium level of service.

services.title: Services
services.lead: Tailored advisory for sellers, buyers and international clients seeking a high-end, well-managed experience.

items.title: Sell with a strategy
items.text: Positioning, pricing guidance, visual presentation, targeted exposure and a polished process from start to finish.

items.title: Valuation & market advice
items.text: Thoughtful pricing opinion based on market comparables, timing, property strengths and target audience.

items.title: Buyer advisory
items.text: Needs analysis, curated opportunities, visits, negotiation support and smooth coordination through completion.

items.title: International coordination
items.text: Bilingual support, local partner network and a clear process adapted to remote and international clients.

about.title: About Stephan
about.lead: A boutique, relationship-led approach combining local expertise, international standards and attention to detail.

blocks.title: Local expertise
blocks.text: Valbonne, Mougins, Opio, Roquefort-les-Pins and the wider Alpes-Maritimes — with a strong understanding of lifestyle, positioning and buyer expectations.

blocks.title: International mindset
blocks.text: Fluent, structured communication for international clients seeking clarity, discretion and quality of execution.

blocks.title: Premium standards
blocks.text: A selective approach, elegant presentation, transparent process and curated recommendations at every step.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: Tell me about your project and receive a fast, thoughtful reply in English or French.
